title: Simply Right Click
description: A mod that lets you right click a bed with any dye to change its color!
body:
# About Simply Right Click
Want to change the color of your bed without breaking it, crafting a new one, or resetting your spawn point?

Simply Right Click is a small mod that lets you easily change the color of a bed just by right-clicking it while holding any color dye of your choice. 

Have fun expressing yourself more efficiently with this mod!
